containerVersion.name: MSAds - Nadpisywanie kodu śledzenia UET Tag

parameter.value:
<script>
    var array_ready_objects = [];
    var array_value_objects = {{dlv - eventModel.items[]}}

    for (var i = 0; i < array_value_objects.length; i++) {
        var contents_format = {}
        contents_format.item_id = array_value_objects[i].item_id              //id
        contents_format.item_quantity = array_value_objects[i].quantity  //quantity
        contents_format.price = array_value_objects[i].price        //price
        array_ready_objects.push(contents_format)
    }
  
        var productIds = array_value_objects.map(function(item) {
        return item.item_id;
    });
</script>
<script>	
   window.uetq_idomods = window.uetq_idomods || []; 
   window.uetq_idomods.push('event', 'purchase', {
        'transaction_id': {{dlv - eventModel.transaction_id}},
		'ecomm_prodid': productIds, 
		'ecomm_pagetype': 'purchase',
		'ecomm_totalvalue': {{dlv - eventModel.value}},
        'revenue_value': {{dlv - eventModel.value}},
		'currency': '{{dlv - eventModel.currency}}',
		'items': array_ready_objects
	});
</script>
<script> 
   window.uetq_idomods = window.uetq_idomods || []; 
   window.uetq_idomods.push ('event', '', {
     'ecomm_prodid': productIds, 
     'ecomm_pagetype': {{cjs - product_type}}
   });   
</script>

<script>
var array_value_objects = {{dlv - eventModel.items[]}};
var productIds = array_value_objects.map(function(item) {
  return item.item_id;
});
</script>
<script>

   window.uetq_idomods.push('event', 'view_search_results', {

<script>

</script>

<script>
   // Add this script right after your base UET tag code
   window.uetq_idomods = window.uetq_idomods || [];
   window.uetq_idomods.push('set', { 'pid': { 
      'em': {{user_data.sha256_email_address}},
      'ph': {{user_data.sha256_phone_number}},
   } });
</script>

<script>
  // cHTML - UETQ - Event - Consent Update
window.uetq_idomods = window.uetq_idomods || [];
window.uetq_idomods.push('consent', 'update', {
    'ad_storage': 'granted'
    });
</script>

<script>

<script>
   window.uetq_idomods = window.uetq_idomods || []; 
   window.uetq_idomods.push('config', 'tcf', { 'enabled' : true });
</script>
<script>
    (function(w,d,t,r,u)
    {
        var f,n,i;
        w[u]=w[u]||[],f=function()
        {
            var o={ti:"{{UET Tag}}", enableAutoSpaTracking: true};
            o.q=w[u],w[u]=new UET(o),w[u].push("pageLoad")
        },
        n=d.createElement(t),n.src=r,n.async=1,n.onload=n.onreadystatechange=function()
        {
            var s=this.readyState;
            s&&s!=="loaded"&&s!=="complete"||(f(),n.onload=n.onreadystatechange=null)
        },
        i=d.getElementsByTagName(t)[0],i.parentNode.insertBefore(n,i)
    })
    (window,document,"script","//bat.bing.com/bat.js","uetq_idomods");
</script>
<script>
// You can set default consent mode right after the UET tag 
window.uetq_idomods = window.uetq_idomods || [];
window.uetq_idomods.push('consent', 'default', {
    'ad_storage': 'denied'
    });
</script>

<script>	
	window.uetq_idomods = window.uetq_idomods || [];
	window.uetq_idomods.push('event', 'view_item', {
		'ecomm_prodid': {{dlv - eventModel.items.0.item_id}}, 
		'ecomm_pagetype': 'product'
		}
	);
</script>
<script>

     'ecomm_pagetype': 'product'
   });   
</script>

tag.name: cHTML - UETQ - Event - Add To Cart

parameter.value:
<script>
    var array_ready_objects = [];
    var array_value_objects = {{dlv - eventModel.items[]}}
    
    for (var i = 0; i < array_value_objects.length; i++) {
        var contents_format = {}
        contents_format.item_id = array_value_objects[i].item_id              //id
        contents_format.item_quantity = array_value_objects[i].quantity  //quantity
        contents_format.price = array_value_objects[i].price        //price
        array_ready_objects.push(contents_format)
    }
        var productIds = array_value_objects.map(function(item) {
        return item.item_id;
    });
</script>
<script>
   window.uetq_idomods = window.uetq_idomods || []; 
   window.uetq_idomods.push('event', 'add_to_cart', {
        'ecomm_prodid': {{dlv - eventModel.items.0.item_id}},
		'ecomm_pagetype': {{cjs - product_type}}, // warunek w regule add_to_cart
        'ecomm_totalvalue': {{dlv - eventModel.value}},
        'revenue_value': {{dlv - eventModel.value}},
        'currency': '{{dlv - eventModel.currency}}',
        'items': array_ready_objects
  });
</script>
